tx.name: AnchorTx
tx.notes: Anchor at origin on front wall center. All scene coordinates are defined relative to this point.

rx.notes: Rx grid at 1.0 m above floor, centered away from walls to reduce trivial corner effects and keep the room computationally compact.

objects.name: glass_partition_1
objects.notes: Partial LoS blocker near room center; intended to create mixed reflection/transmission behavior.

objects.name: metal_cabinet_1
objects.notes: High-reflectivity object near side wall for strong specular multipath.

objects.name: wood_desk_1
objects.notes: Low-height wooden reflector; usually weak LoS blocker but useful for floor-level multipath enrichment.

name: Scenario B: Mixed-material office
description: Scenario A + glass partition + metal cabinet + wooden desk. This is the main shared scene for testing material-dependent CP rejection behavior and the weakening of r_CP under non-ideal reflection conditions.
